titleStmt.title: SII 25.244: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 244. (A.R. No. 244 of 1908.) DANTĒWĀRĀ, BASTAR STATE, CENTRAL PROVINCES.

summary.p: This Sanskrit inscription in Nāgarī script is dated in Saṁvat 1760, Vaiśākha, vadi 3 (3rd day of dark fortnight).

It records the genealogy of this king commencing from Kākati Pratāparudra, who was the king of Ōraṅgal (Warangal). Also the military achievements of Dikpāladēva are recorded. It states that Annamarāja, the brother of Pratāparudra was the first to come to Bastar. The genealogy of nine successors upto the time of Dikpāladēva is narrated here.

Then, it records the tour undertaken by Rāja Dikpāladēva to the Dantēśvarī temple, when ‘so many thousands of buffaloes and goats were sacrificed, that the waters of Śaṅkhinī river became red like kusuma flowers and remained so for five days’. The Kākatīyas are mentioned to be Sōmavaṁśīs, born of the Pāṇḍava Arjuna. The tour to Daṁtāvalā is mentioned as a kuṭuṁba-jātrā. It was intended probably to celebrate a festival to propiate his tutelary deity evidently Dantēśvarī.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
. śrī dantāvalādevī jayati . śrī somavaṁśa pāṁḍavārjunakule kā
. katī pratāparudranāmā rājā Oraṁgaladeśe samabhavat . yasyedaṁ padyaṁ na
. valakṣadhanurdharādhināthe pṛthivīṁ śāsati kākatīyarudre . Abhavat
. paramagrahāra pīḍā kucakuṁbheṣu kuraṁgalocanānāṁ . tasyai kadā svarṇṇavṛ
. ṣṭisaṁjāto padravāt . naṣṭarājyasya śivasāyujyaṁ prāptasya . bhrātā Atra
marāja nāmā yavanamayāt nijadeśaṁ parityajya daṁḍakāraṇyanikaṭa bastaradeśe
rājyaṁ cakāra . tadvaṁśe haṁmiradevanāmā rājā jātaḥ . tat putro bhairavarājadeknā
mārājā jātaḥ . tatputro rājādhirājaḥ puruṣotmadevo . tat putro jayatasiṁharāya devo rā
jā jātaḥ . tat putro narasiṁharāyadevo rājā jātaḥ . tat putro jagadīśarāyadevo jātaḥ . tat
putro viranārāyaṇadevo mahārājo jātaḥ . tat putraḥ samasta praśasti sahitasuta kī
rtivitāna . śrī vīrasiṁhadeva devo mahārājaḥ . saptaṣaṣṭi varṣāvadhimahīṁ paripālya vaikuṁ
ṭhaṁ jagāma . tasya putro vividhavirudāvalī virājamāna mānonnata . samarasā
hasīkamalla . taravārividārita pratimahīpamalla . pracaṁḍa dorddaḍākuṣṭakodaṁḍa
kaṁḍitārātivargga . helāgṛhīta navaraṁgapuradurgga . yaddamahiṣī mahārājñīṁ A
javakumāridevī sahita rakṣita trivargga . śrī bhagavān gurumaṁtropadeśe saṁjāta bha
rgga . pṛthurājāvatāra Aṣṭādaśavarṣa vayaprāpta rakṣapāla denākumāra . svasti śrī
mahārājādhirājo dikpāladevadevo yathārtha nāmā śatavarṣāvadhi niṣkaṁṭakāṁ
mahīpālayati . tena caikadāśvapuranivāsi janena sahadaṁtāvalāṁ samāganya kuṭuṁ
bajātrākṛta . tatra bahusahasramahiṣa chāgaśarīra saṁyāṁta stktapravāhaiḥ śaṁkhinīṁ
nadīṁ śroṇitodāmakarot . Ityarthaṁ likhitaṁ prastheti satvācaṁdratārakaṁ . dikpāla
deva sadṛśo bhuṇena bhavitā kalau . 1 . samvat 1760 vaijhāśa vadi 3 yā likhitaṁ śrī
bhagavān miśra mathila paṁḍitena .
Digital edition of SII 25.244 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
